text:
いやほんとスゴかったなぁー！
動きがオレの目に焼き付いてるよ。
いい経験を積めてうらやましいぜ！

やっぱ、ああいう相手は
隙をみて一気呵成に攻めていく
ってのが王道だよな。
オレも参考にさせてもらうぜ！

That was aces, pal! I'm never gonna forget the
moves I saw you make out there. Wish I could
get experiences like that under my belt!

I guess with enemies like that, you gotta just
look for an opening and then wallop till one
of you goes down.

I'll just file this away in the ol' mental data
bank! Thanks, pal!
